title: Copper and Tuff Backport
body:
![Project title as an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bc44994916ca2fa21fec1ace8b1e97deb0beecf.png) Backports the Copper and Tuff blocks due to be implemented in 1.21 to older versions of MC.

## Additions ![List of Items included in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71a2ec68849bd1e3637d609961b1d0055cffad58.png) | Name | Status | Version | |------|--------|---------| |Tuff Slab|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Stairs |Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Wall |Complete| v1.0.1 | |Polished Tuff|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Polished Tuff Slab|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Polished Tuff Stairs|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Polished Tuff Wall|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Chiseled Tuff|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Bricks|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Brick Slab|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Brick Stairs|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Tuff Brick Wall|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Chiseled Tuff Bricks|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Chiseled Copper x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Copper Trapdoor x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Copper Grate x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Copper Door x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Copper Bulb x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)|Complete| v1.0.1 | |Copper Helmet | Complete | v1.3.0 | |Copper Chestpiece | Complete | v1.3.0 | |Copper Leggings | Complete | v1.3.0 | |Copper Boots | Complete | v1.3.0 | |Copper Sword | Complete | v1.3.1 | |Copper Axe | Complete | v1.3.1 | |Copper Shovel | Complete | v1.3.1 | |Copper Pickaxe | Complete | v1.3.1 | |Copper Hoe | Complete | v1.3.1 | |Copper Horse Armor | Complete | v1.3.2 | |Copper Nugget | Complete | v1.3.2 | |Copper Torch | Complete | v1.3.3 | |Copper Lantern x8 (Oxidations and Waxed)| Complete| v1.3.4| |Copper Chain x8 (Oxidations and Waxed) | Complete | v1.3.5 | |Bolt Armor Trim | Complete | v1.3.6| |Copper Bars |Complete|v1.3.6| |Lightning Rod | Planned | v1.4.0 | |Copper Chest |Planned|v1.4.0| ## Credits The original version of the mod was created by [Xanthian](https://github.com/xanthian), almost all thanks should go to them. Textures are the property of Mojang.
